title: Chandogya 7.23: Bhuma — The Infinite
description: From the Chandogya 7.23 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Chandogya 7.23 — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Bhuma is happiness. There is no happiness in the small. Only in the infinite is happiness. The infinite must be sought. Where one sees nothing else, hears nothing else, knows nothing else — that is the infinite.
